_comment: Curated trivial / conversational / tiny-mechanical prompts that must route to NONE. Guards against over-routing (which costs an extra hop under the name-only baseline). Mined positives/boundaries come from skills/*/evals/evals.json; these are the only hand-authored cases, sanctioned by the design note in docs/EVALS.md.
prompts: thanks, that's exactly what I needed!
what does the acronym CRUD stand for?
can you rename the variable `usr` to `user` in this function?
good morning! ready to pair today?
fix the typo in this comment: 'recieve' should be 'receive'
what's the difference between == and === in JavaScript?
